articles.description: England fans have seen Cole Palmer produce the goods for the national team before. They did, of course, still go on to lose that game, as they have done at countless tournaments over the years.

articles.title: The only place timid Scotland should be going is home
articles.description: It says much about the absurdity of this World Cup on steroids that Scotland could still reach the knockout phase for the first time ever despite scoring fewer goals than Haiti. Three points out of a possible nine, a goal difference of minus three, and a solitary deflected strike against the world’s 88th-ranked team: it would, in any sane tournament, be a recipe for beating a dignified retreat to Miami airport.
